stemHtml: For a constant-speed propeller, how will the propeller efficiency change from the brake-release point to the start of the climb?

options.a: It increases until reaching the optimum angle of attack then remains at maximum.
options.b: It increases until reaching the optimum angle of attack then decreases.
options.c: It decreases until reaching the optimum angle of attack then increases.
options.d: It decreases until reaching the optimum angle of attack then remains constant.
